name: Gnome
text: For every card in your hand with "Gnome" in its name, add: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

condition.text: Count cards in hand with Gnome in name

effects.actionText: Add Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier per matching hand card
effects.value: Atk Dice Rolls +1 and Modifier +1 per Gnome card

condition.text: Count cards in hand with Gnome in name

effects.notes: Need decide timing; text says for every card in hand. Modifier applies to both Hit Roll and Attack Damage Roll.

notes: Card appears to spell Haflings and moral this way.
